case_title: ANTONIA GARCIA CANTOR VS. ALICE CARUTHER ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,120.00 FILED BY CANTOR, ANTONIA GARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT CARUTHER, ALICE RAMOS, YOLANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ANTONIA GARCIA CANTOR AND DEFENDANT YOLANDA RAMOS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ALICE CARUTHER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT CARUTHER. NO PROOF OF SERVCIE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT YOLANDA RAMOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETERS NINA SAFDIE & DANIEL NAVARRO ASSISTED MS. CANTOR AND MS. CARUTHER AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANTOR, ANTONIA GARCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARUTHER, ALICE $4,120.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,160.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST YOLANDA RAMOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE AND AS PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY YOLANDA RAMOS.
